name: rapp-static-shortener

layers: location.replace — instant, and history-safe so Back doesn't trap the visitor
canonical + og: tags — the short page attributes to the destination when shared/indexed
redirect.passthrough: the JS layer forwards any inbound ?query and #hash onto the destination (campaign/UTM links keep working)
redirect.privacy: no server means no click logging — every redirect is private by construction

content_store: versions/<slug>/<sha8>.json — append-only, content-addressed. Every destination a slug has EVER pointed at is kept and is pinnable forever.
